name: moon-bot-slack-agent
description: Slack-native coding agent backed by Cloudflare Workers AI

scripts.smoke: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-test SLACK_APP_TOKEN=xapp-test CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=test CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=test DIAGNOSE_LLM_PING=true MEMORY_FILE=/tmp/moon-bot-smoke-memory.json BUCKET_DIR=/tmp/moon-bot-smoke-bucket SESSIONS_DIR=/tmp/moon-bot-smoke-sessions THREAD_MAP_FILE=/tmp/moon-bot-smoke-sessions/thread-map.json SECURITY_AUDIT_LOG_FILE=/tmp/moon-bot-smoke-sessions/audit.jsonl BUCKET_HTTP_PORT=13001 SCHEDULED_WEEKLY_REPORT_CHANNEL=C1111111111 SCHEDULED_DEPLOY_CHANNEL=C2222222222 tsx scripts/smoke.ts
